summary: Top‑notch audience recording, clearly an upgrade over earlier sources.
review: The reviewer declares this to be the best audience source they’ve heard, describing it as a definite upgrade in clarity and overall sound quality. No comments are made about the musical performance or setlist.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, highly positive review focused on recording quality; no information on show performance, so rating is based mainly on the reported audio improvement.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it the best audience source and a definite upgrade over previous versions, implying clear, improved sound.
